decision.rationale: The plate violates IR.sean.hair.front-quiff-cowlick because the character is facing right, but the front quiff curves and flicks to the left (pointing backward) instead of curving and flicking forward (to the right). Additionally, IR.sean.motion.head-turn-nine-frame is borderline: while the structural components of the head turn are honored (frame 9 is a three-quarter extreme, the ear has transitioned to the left side, and the quiff remains the highest point of the silhouette), the quiff itself does not maintain its forward-pointing behavior as required for a coherent turn sequence.
